properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every time I come running I find grace on repeat You welcome me with open arms No matter where I have been Every time I surrender Every time I fall I find grace more precious than I did before

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I'm gonna lay my world down Here at Your feet Look to the Heavens For all I need I'm gonna sing my heart out Praise on repeat To the God who's never given up on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the mercy at midnight You're the kindness of dawn My hope in every waking hour And the strength I lean on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every time it comes to sundown And the night sets in Let my soul remember, just how good You've been And again and again, my heart will sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm gonna lay my world down Here at Your feet Look to the Heavens For all I need I'm gonna sing my heart out Praise on repeat To the God who's never given up on me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause You're the God who's never giving up on me Grace upon grace Morning by morning Day after day will I sing Praise upon praise God be exalted Over and over again

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, grace upon grace Morning by morning Day after day will I sing Praise upon praise God be exalted Over and over again

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Grace upon grace Morning by morning Day after day will I sing Praise upon praise God be exalted Over and over again

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I'm gonna lay my world down Here at Your feet Look to the Heavens For all I need I'm gonna sing my heart out Praise on repeat To the God who's never given up on me 'Cause You're the God who's never giving up on me
